Class Session

java.lang.Object
com.project.controller.Session
public class Session extends Object
The Session class stores temporary application state during runtime.

It maintains information about the currently logged-in employee, the current order cart, selected menu category, and notification messages passed between views.

    Adds an item to the order cart.

    clear()
    Clears all session data, including the current user, cart contents, selected category, and notification message.

    Clears all items from the order cart.

    Returns the current notification message and clears it so it will not appear again.

  • Method Details

    • getCurrentUser

      public Employee getCurrentUser()
      Returns the currently logged-in employee.
      Returns:
      the current user

    • setCurrentUser

      public void setCurrentUser(Employee currentUser)
      Sets the currently logged-in employee.
      Parameters:
      currentUser - the employee to store in the session

    • getCart

      public javafx.collections.ObservableList<OrderItem> getCart()
      Returns the current order cart.
      Returns:
      observable list of order items

    • addToCart

      public void addToCart(OrderItem item)
      Adds an item to the order cart.
      Parameters:
      item - the order item to add

    • removeFromCart

      public void removeFromCart(OrderItem item)
      Removes an item from the order cart.
      Parameters:
      item - the order item to remove

    • clearCart

      public void clearCart()
      Clears all items from the order cart.

    • getSelectedCategoryId

      public Integer getSelectedCategoryId()
      Returns the currently selected category ID.
      Returns:
      the selected category ID

    • setSelectedCategoryId

      public void setSelectedCategoryId(Integer id)
      Sets the selected category ID for menu navigation.
      Parameters:
      id - the category ID

    • consumeNotification

      public String consumeNotification()
      Returns the current notification message and clears it so it will not appear again.
      Returns:
      the notification message, or null if none exists

    • setNotification

      public void setNotification(String msg)
      Sets a notification message to be displayed on the next screen.
      Parameters:
      msg - the notification message

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Clears all session data, including the current user, cart contents, selected category, and notification message.
